title: Pizza over the coals – no recipe, easy

seo.title: Pizza over the coals - no recipe, easy - Marinda Kook

html:
There are recipes that just ARE. This is one such recipe. You really have a free hand to make whatever you feel like. The most important thing is to have enough cheese. The crust turns out lovely and “crisp” .

 

I bought the pizza base from Die Deeghuys. Two of them.

Put the bottom one on your grid.

Then spread any tomato, garlic or peri-peri spread over that one base. Sprinkle generously with cheese and pile on anything else your heart desires. Place the other base on top of your layer of cheese. Close your grid.

 

Braai slowly over medium coals.

 

It's a treat with no end. Enjoy it as a main meal or just as a starter.

A great treat for the summer that lies ahead.
